channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Are Protein Bars Actually Good for You?
item.description: Protein bars have become the go-to snack for busy women trying to eat healthier. They're tucked into gym bags, desk drawers and carry-on luggage, prom...

item.title: Wyoming Wants To Make Its Five-Year Federal Rural Health Funding Last ‘Forever’
item.description: State officials believe they’ve found a way to extend the life of federal Rural Health Transformation Program money Wyoming is receiving as part of la...

item.title: If You're Dealing With Crepey Skin, Stop Doing These 3 Things
item.description: Bonus: They simultaneously help ease wrinkles, too.

item.title: This Lowers Signs Of Inflammation After Menopause, Study Finds
item.description: And about 41% of all people have insufficient levels of it.

item.title: This Is How Much Time To Leave Between Meals For Optimal Digestion
item.description: And why your gut wants you to avoid grazing.

item.title: How To Help Your Kid Cope With Anxiety — Without Fueling Your Own
item.description: The feeling isn't the problem, it's how we respond.

item.title: 5 Things To Stop Doing For A Healthier Vagina, From An OB/GYN
item.description: Plus, how to tell when something is off.

item.title: Red and Blue States Alike Want To Limit AI in Insurance. Trump Wants To Limit the States.
item.description: A revolt is afoot in both red and blue states against the use of artificial intelligence in health insurance determinations — and against efforts led ...

item.title: Reverend Jesse Jackson, a Civil Rights Legend, Has Passed Away
item.description: The Reverend Jesse Louis Jackson, Sr., who worked with Dr. Martin Luther King, founded the Rainbow PUSH Coalition and ran twice for the Democratic nom...

item.title: Medical Tourism 101
item.description: Millions of people travel to a different country for medical care every year. My friend Ann* is one of them. My first response when I heard she wanted...

item.title: La respuesta del equipo de Trump a los aumentos de las primas de ACA: cobertura catastrófica
item.description: La cobertura médica y su accesibilidad se han convertido en temas políticamente sensibles de cara a las elecciones de medio término de noviembre.

item.title: Listen to the Latest ‘KFF Health News Minute’
item.description: The "KFF Health News Minute” brings original health care and health policy reporting from our newsroom to the airwaves each week.

item.title: Sofia Noori, Nema Health
item.description: Nema Health has cracked the code on PTSD and has an amazing study showing that their technique of intensive cognitive processing therapy is over 99% e...

item.title: Trump Required Hospitals To Post Their Prices for Patients. Mostly It’s the Industry Using the Data.
item.description: Politicians have pushed for price transparency in health care. But instead of patients shopping for services, it’s mostly health systems and insurers ...

item.title: The Body Knows: Two Mothers Who Survived the Unthinkable
item.description: Motherhood is often framed as a new chapter, a deepening of identity, and the arrival of a love unlike any other. For two women, Anjellica Davis and E...

item.title: AI replaces me: The Private AI Bubble Meets the Public Digital Health Reality Check
item.description: By CLAUDE.AI trying to write like me MATTHEW HOLT I finally did what I have been wanting to do for a while and had an AI ingest everything I’ve writte...

item.description: By MIKE MAGEE Last month, Dario Amodei, CEO of Anthropic, did it again – scaring the bejesus out of societal leaders worldwide with warnings that thei...

item.description: Español There are several types of lupus, but people often use the word “lupus” to mean systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), the most common form of th...

item.title: Ten Ten Ten – Trying to radically fix health care in the US
item.description: The goal of the new non profit Ten Ten Ten founded by TJ Tedesco & Bhargav Raman is to take America from being the most expensive health system in the...

item.title: Where Women Live Impacts Their Health: Here Are The 10 Best States
item.description: Where a woman lives plays a critical role in her health outcomes. It shapes her access to healthcare, safety, and overall quality of life. A new analy...

item.title: 2026: A Year for Reimagining Healthcare’s Safety Net
item.description: By JEFF BRANDES To say healthcare’s safety net experienced tectonic shifts in 2025 would be an understatement. The rapid introduction of multiple and ...

item.description: Español Chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) , hives (urticaria) that last 6 weeks or longer (chronic) and have an unknown cause (spontaneous), can hav...

item.title: 10 Things Black and Brown Women Need to Know About Heart Disease
item.description: Heart disease is the leading cause of death for Black and Brown women—yet many don’t know their unique risks. These ten facts highlight what every wom...

item.title: Kid ‘n Play‘s Christopher Reid Reveals He Had a Heart Transplant
